name: Adcorp Holdings Limited
summary: Adcorp Holdings Limited provides workplace solutions in South Africa and Australia. It operates through Industrial Services, Support Services, Professional Services, Financial Services, and Training Services segments. The company offers permanent recruitment and flexible staffing, professional IT, business process outsourcing, training, and financial services; and agency agreement, shared, managed, emergent business, payroll card, and project management products and services. Adcorp Holdings Limited was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Johannesburg, South Africa.
